title: Collab Link Building
show_notes_text:
What is Collab Link Building?

Collaborating with some other companies in related industries or shoulder niches, in order to earn backlinks. It means finding (and partnering with) companies within your niche or shoulder niches that cater to the same audience as you but which are NOT your competitors.

Example:
If you manage a SaaS product that helps homeowners manage their home, you can earn links via Collab Link Building by partnering with:
- Realtors
- Architects
- Online Retailers Offering Furniture
- Online Retailers Selling Rugs
- And the list goes on!

Topics Covered:
- The successful outcome of using Collab Link Building
- How Collab Link Building is done
- Good examples (case studies) of company sites using it
- How you can get high-quality backlinks through the same strategy
transcript_text: No transcript available for this episode. Listen via the Anchor embed or Spotify link above.
